questions.question: Define a bipartite graph and explain why it has no cycles. (4 marks)
questions.hint: Consider a bipartite graph as a collection of disjoint sets

questions.question: Let G be a bipartite graph with 8 vertices. If the degree of each vertex in one part is 2 and in the other part is 4, find the total number of edges. (5 marks)
Consider a bipartite graph with 2 vertices in each part. If one vertex in each part is isolated, find the degree of the isolated vertices. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Use the definition of degree of a vertex
